Curated Journeys

Featured Heritage Trails

Carefully crafted multi-day experiences that combine cultural immersion, adventure, and community impact.

CultureFoodSpirituality
Easy

Kathmandu Valley Heritage Circuit

A 5-day deep dive into the art, architecture, and living culture of the Kathmandu Valley.

📅 5 Days⭐ 4.8
From
NPR 25,000
TrekkingCultureAdventure
Moderate

Annapurna Culture & Adventure Trail

Combine breathtaking mountain scenery with authentic Gurung culture over 7 unforgettable days.

📅 7 Days⭐ 4.9
From
NPR 35,000
SpiritualityCulture
Easy

Sacred Nepal Spiritual Journey

A soul-stirring 6-day pilgrimage across Nepal's most sacred sites from Lumbini to Kathmandu.

📅 6 Days⭐ 4.7
From
NPR 30,000

Authentic Experiences

Discover curated experiences across four categories, each verified for authenticity and community benefit.

Homestays
